hero.headline: Transform Your Home with Expert Craftsmanship
hero.subheadline: From interior accents to full exterior makeovers, we deliver flawless finishes that last.

featureSections.title: Breathe New Life Into Every Room
featureSections.body: Our interior painting services go beyond a simple coat of paint. We meticulously prep surfaces, choose the perfect sheen, and apply premium paints for a smooth, durable finish that enhances your home's beauty and value.
bullets: Meticulous surface preparation for a flawless finish
Premium paints that resist fading and scuffs
Minimal disruption with our clean, efficient process
featureSections.cardBody: We start with a detailed consultation, then prep and protect your space, and finally apply two coats of premium paint with expert precision.

featureSections.title: Boost Curb Appeal & Protect Your Investment
featureSections.body: Your home's exterior faces the elements every day. Our exterior painting services use weather-resistant paints and thorough preparation to ensure a beautiful, long-lasting finish that stands up to Texas sun and storms.
bullets: Pressure washing and scraping for a clean surface
Comprehensive protection against moisture and pests
featureSections.cardBody: A fresh exterior paint job can increase your home's value by up to 5% and dramatically improve its curb appeal.

whyChooseUs.title: Local Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: We know Dallas neighborhoods and the unique challenges of local climate, ensuring your paint job lasts longer.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Materials
whyChooseUs.description: We use only top-tier paints and supplies from trusted brands like Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful
whyChooseUs.description: Our team treats your home like our own — we cover furniture, clean up daily, and leave no mess behind.

whyChooseUs.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind our work with a full satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy, we'll make it right.

testimonials.quote: Jerry's team transformed our living room with a beautiful accent wall. They were punctual, professional, and the finish is flawless.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: We hired Jerry's to paint the entire exterior of our 1950s home. They prepped meticulously and the results are stunning. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Mike T.

testimonials.quote: The wallpaper removal and painting in our kitchen was a nightmare until Jerry's handled it. They made it look easy and the room feels brand new.
testimonials.author: Linda R.

cta.headline: Ready to Transform Your Home?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation estimate.

servicesPage.intro: At Jerry's Painting & Wallpaper, we offer a full range of painting and wallpaper services to meet your needs. From interior and exterior painting to wallpaper installation and removal, our skilled team delivers exceptional results every time.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.shortDescription: Transform your home's interior with expert color consultation and flawless painting.
services.longDescription: Our interior painting service covers every room — from bedrooms to basements. We protect your floors and furniture, repair drywall, and apply smooth, even coats for a finish that looks like it was always meant to be there.
benefits: Enhances your home's ambiance and value
Covers scuffs, stains, and uneven color

process.title: Consultation & Color Selection
process.description: We discuss your vision, measure the space, and help you choose the perfect colors and finishes.

process.title: Preparation & Protection
process.description: We move furniture, cover floors, tape edges, and repair any wall imperfections.

process.title: Painting & Cleanup
process.description: We apply two coats of premium paint with expert brush and roller techniques, then clean up thoroughly.

faqs.question: How long does interior painting take?
faqs.answer: Most rooms take 1-2 days depending on size and complexity. We'll give you a precise timeline during your estimate.

faqs.question: Do I need to move furniture?
faqs.answer: No! We'll move and protect your furniture, and put everything back when we're done.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your home's exterior with weather-resistant paints.
services.longDescription: Our exterior painting service includes thorough preparation — pressure washing, scraping, caulking, and priming — followed by two coats of high-quality exterior paint. We work efficiently to minimize disruption and ensure a stunning, long-lasting finish.
benefits: Boosts curb appeal and home value
Protects against sun, rain, and pests
Prevents wood rot and siding damage

process.title: Inspection & Prep
process.description: We inspect the exterior, pressure wash, scrape loose paint, and repair any damage.

process.title: Caulking & Priming
process.description: We caulk gaps, seal windows and doors, and apply primer to bare wood or metal.

process.title: Painting & Final Walkthrough
process.description: We apply two coats of premium exterior paint and review the work with you to ensure your satisfaction.

faqs.question: How long does exterior paint last?
faqs.answer: With our high-quality paints and proper prep, expect 5-10 years depending on climate and surface.

faqs.question: Do you paint in winter?
faqs.answer: We paint year-round as long as temperatures are above 40°F. We'll schedule around weather for best results.

services.title: Wallpaper Installation & Removal
services.shortDescription: Expert wallpaper services for a stunning accent or complete room transformation.
services.longDescription: Whether you want to add a bold wallpaper accent or remove outdated paper, we handle it all. Our team has years of experience with all types of wallpaper — from peel-and-stick to traditional paste — and we ensure seamless patterns and clean edges.
benefits: Removal service leaves walls smooth and ready

process.title: Assessment & Selection
process.description: We evaluate your walls and help you choose the right wallpaper type and pattern.

process.title: Installation or Removal
process.description: We carefully install or remove wallpaper using professional tools and techniques.

process.title: Finishing Touches
process.description: We trim edges, align patterns, and clean up all debris for a pristine finish.

faqs.question: Can you remove old wallpaper?
faqs.answer: Yes! We use steamers and solvents to remove wallpaper without damaging drywall, then prep the walls for paint or new paper.

faqs.question: How long does wallpaper installation take?
faqs.answer: A standard room usually takes 1-2 days, depending on pattern matching and complexity.

services.title: Cabinet & Trim Painting
services.shortDescription: Give your cabinets and trim a durable, factory-like finish.
services.longDescription: Update your kitchen, bathroom, or any room with beautifully painted cabinets and trim. We use sprayers and high-quality enamels for a smooth, hard finish that resists chips and stains. Our process includes thorough cleaning, sanding, priming, and multiple coats.
benefits: Transforms the look of your kitchen or bath

process.title: Cleaning & Sanding
process.description: We degrease and sand all surfaces to ensure proper adhesion.

process.title: Priming & Caulking
process.description: We apply a high-bond primer and caulk all gaps for a seamless look.

process.title: Spraying & Finishing
process.description: We spray two coats of enamel paint, then lightly sand between coats for a smooth finish.

faqs.question: Can you paint laminate cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, with proper preparation and the right primer, we can paint laminate cabinets for a durable finish.

faqs.question: How long does cabinet painting take?
faqs.answer: A typical kitchen takes 3-5 days, including drying time between coats.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Painters Since 2003
about.mission: To deliver exceptional painting and wallpaper services that enhance the beauty and value of every home we touch, with unwavering quality and integrity.
story: Jerry's Painting & Wallpaper started as a small, family-run operation with a simple mission: provide Dallas homeowners with painting services that stand the test of time. Founder Jerry Martinez, a master painter with over 20 years of experience, built the business on a foundation of hard work, attention to detail, and genuine care for every client. What began as one-man crew has grown into a team of skilled professionals who share Jerry's passion for craftsmanship.

Today, we serve the entire Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex, from historic homes in Highland Park to modern builds in Frisco. We've painted thousands of homes and earned a reputation for reliability, cleanliness, and stunning results. Every project, big or small, receives the same meticulous preparation and high-quality materials. We're proud to be a trusted name in Dallas painting.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work, ensuring every brushstroke meets our high standards.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We provide honest estimates, transparent communication, and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and your time with the utmost respect, leaving it cleaner than we found it.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be part of the Dallas community and support local causes whenever possible.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Estimate Today
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out the form below.
